prompt: At runtime the server reads JSON descriptor files the build wrote to disk, and it can also treat one as executable module text. Where does it read and cache one of these on-disk descriptors, and where does it instead evaluate a descriptor's contents as a module?

rubric.answer_shape: two functions, one reading, one evaluating

evidence.claim: reads and caches an on-disk descriptor
evaluates a descriptor as a module

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
